atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the @tailwind directive to insert Tailwind's base, components, utilities and variants styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use @apply to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the @layer directive to tell Tailwind which layer a custom style belongs to.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Use the @theme directive to define your project's custom design tokens.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Use the @config directive to specify a custom Tailwind config file.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Use the @variant directive to apply a Tailwind variant to custom CSS.
